SCENARIO:

*ੈ✿‧₊˚ After witnessing a heavily drugged man attempting to take his own life at a train station, you manage to save him—however, he’s far more damaged than you could’ve ever expected, and by time he’s in your arms, he’s already passed out. So, you have no other choice than to bring him to your apartment to take care of him for the time being. By time he’s awake, he’s wary, and he can’t seem to grasp the reason as to why you’d save him from what he considered his inevitable demise.
